title: asclepias orbicularis
intro: Asclepias orbicularis is a perennial plant species belonging to the milkweed family, characterized by its round or oval-shaped leaves and clusters of small, white or purple flowers. The plant's roots and stems contain cardenolides, a type of glycoside that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Asclepias orbicularis has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
